name: Praline and Pumpkin Harvest Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, pecans, brown sugar, and butter. Press firmly into the bottom and 1/2 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Chill.
2. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese and sugars until smooth. Beat in eggs one at a time until just blended. Add pumpkin, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, milk, and cornstarch. Mix until thoroughly combined.
3. Pour the filling into the prepared crust. Bake at 350 degreesF for 50 to 55 minutes, or until the center of the cake is set. Remove from the oven and run a knife around the sides of the pan. Cool at room temperature. Chill, covered, overnight.
